text:
[Perhaps it would be good to first dedicate a sonnet agent to retrieve ALL transcripts that the archeologist would process, process them via an opus agent (so basically building an opus-generated/manually-constructed wiki) and then use that as a comparison to see what the archeologist (or iterations_) would generate [...] - **Track 1 (archeologist):** still running — dry-run → smoke → full 47-session replay → self-review, into a temp wiki.
- **Track 2 (gold standard):** digest done (378 claims/44 sessions); Opus now assembling the idealized ~15-30 guide wiki as the yardstick.
